evals.prompt: I want to add multi-tenant auth to my Supabase + React project so multiple organizations can each have their own team of users. Where do I start?
expectations: References the six-tier shipping plan (Tier 1 through Tier 6)
Mentions Pillar 1 (security_invoker=true) when discussing views
Recommends starting with Tier 1 foundation (tables + RLS + helper function)
Surfaces the pre-flight checklist (extensions, env vars, redirect URLs)
Cites the 12 doctrinal pillars or at least 3 of them by name
Does NOT skip directly to writing code without doctrine

evals.prompt: Help me build a team invitation system where org admins can invite teammates by email. The teammate clicks a link in their email and joins the org.
expectations: Mentions Pillar 5 (atomic claim via RPC + partial unique index)
Mentions Pillar 4 (JWT-derived invited_by, never from request body)
Warns about two-tab race conditions and idempotent already_claimed=200
Mentions Pillar 10 (pagination-safe duplicate check, NOT auth.admin.listUsers)
References templates/02_invites.sql AND templates/send-invite-edge-function.ts
Surfaces Pillar 12 with code='email_send_failed' for retry UI

evals.prompt: Users in Tenant A can see data from Tenant B in our Supabase pipeline view. How do I fix this?
expectations: Diagnoses likely cause as Pillar 1 violation (view missing security_invoker=true)
References pitfalls.md P-1 OR doctrine.md Pillar 1
Provides the CI grep query for views without security_invoker=on
Mentions Pillar 3 (qual=true SELECT policies forbidden) as second-line check
Cites the dd_deal_reviews failure precedent OR similar leak example
Recommends running the cross-tenant penetration tests

evals.prompt: How do I implement a 'transfer ownership' button in my team management UI without locking the org out of having any owner?
expectations: Mentions Pillar 6 (promote-BEFORE-demote in single transaction)
Explains why reverse order fails (last-owner trigger blocks demote-self)
References templates/03_team_mgmt.sql transfer_ownership RPC
Mentions the last-owner guard trigger as a safety net
Recommends single-transaction atomic implementation, NOT two separate RPC calls

evals.prompt: How do I integrate Stripe subscription billing with usage-based pricing for my SaaS?
I'm building a React Native mobile app and need biometric auth + secure token storage on iOS.
I want multi-tenant auth using Better Auth with Drizzle ORM and Postgres, no Supabase. Can this skill help?
expectations: Notes that this skill is Supabase-specific
Suggests better-auth-security skill instead
Optionally notes the doctrine pillars are still useful as conceptual reference

validated_on: a SaaS app CM.32 (origin — 4 phases shipped 2026-04-19 to 2026-04-21)
validation_notes.held_out_test: Apply skill to a fresh Supabase + Vite + React project with no existing auth/team concepts. All 6 tiers should ship cleanly using only the skill's references and templates.
